arts.ttl: England-Ireland lineups confirmed as Harry Kane returns and debutant in defence
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane returns to the Three Lions' starting lineup for their UEFA Nations League clash with the Republic of Ireland at Wembley.

arts.ttl: England v Republic of Ireland: Nations League – live
arts.sum: Minute-by-minute updates on the action at Wembley Any comments or thoughts? You can email Rob Noni Madueke starts again tonight Lee Carsley continues to experiment, giving a debut to Tino Livramento and a full debut to his fellow Newcastle full-back Lewis Hall. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Postcard from London: Folly to write off Ireland?
arts.sum: And the Ireland team arrived at the venue late on Saturday evening for a pitch walk having trained in Dublin in the morning before taking flight to London for their final UEFA Nations League game, which wraps up the 2024 calendar. But for football fans, the stadium was all about one Saturday every May when the FA Cup final would dominate the airwaves, as television viewers followed the two teams from breakfast at the hotel, on the coach to the ground and all the way out the tunnel onto the hallowed turf, stopping for an always rousing edition of Abide With Me just before kick-off.

arts.ttl: What do England need to get promoted in the Nations League?
arts.sum: The Three Lions are looking to secure automatic promotion back to League A before Lee Carsley hands over to Thomas Tuchel in 2025

arts.ttl: England vs Ireland – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: England host the Republic of Ireland on Sunday as the two teams conclude their Nations League campaigns. The Three Lions will confirm promotion back to the top tier of the Nations League with a win at Wembley. Here is everything you need to know about the clash. arts.ttl: Cole Palmer turns up at football match in disguise after pulling out of England duty
arts.sum: Cole Palmer pulled out of the England squads and found himself at a loose end on a Saturday so opted to head out to watch Stockport's League One clash against Wrexham

arts.ttl: 'Shocked' Harry Kane responds to being dropped by England ahead of Thomas Tuchel arrival
arts.sum: Harry Kane was a shock exclusion from England's win over Greece and the captain admits he was shocked by the news before he shifted his focus to ensure the team was properly prepared

arts.ttl: England predicted XI for Republic of Ireland clash as Lee Carsley makes changes for final game
arts.sum: Lee Carsley named a makeshift England team against Greece and still secured a 3-0 win to put them in the driving seat for their Nations League group - and now he could make a handful of changes against Ireland
